# Kultur- og likestillingsdepartementet

*33 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov om Kulturrådet (kulturrådsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) | Kulturrådsloven | 2013-06-07 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) |
| [Lov om Likestillings- og diskrimineringsombudet og Diskrimineringsnemnda (diskri](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.md) | Diskrimineringsombudsloven – diskrol | 2018-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.md) |
| [Lov om Riksteatret [riksteaterlova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) | Riksteaterlova | 1949-04-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) |
| [Lov om arkiv [arkivlova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) | Arkivlova – arkl | 1999-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) |
| [Lov om avgift på offentlig framføring av utøvende kunstneres prestasjoner m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) | Lov om avgift til fond for utøvende kunstnere | 1957-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) |
| [Lov om avgift på omsetning av billedkunst m.m. (kunstavgiftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) | Kunstavgiftsloven | 1948-11-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) |
| [Lov om avgift til Det norske komponistfond](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) | Lov om avgift til Det norske komponistfond | 1965-04-09 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) |
| [Lov om avleveringsplikt for allment tilgjengelege dokument (pliktavleveringslova](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) | Pliktavleveringslova – avlvl | 1990-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) |
| [Lov om behandling av personopplysninger i Norges idrettsforbund og olympiske og ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-95.md) | Lov om behandling av personopplysninger i Norges idrettsforbund mv | 2025-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-95.md) |
| [Lov om beskyttelse av mindreårige mot skadelige bildeprogram mv.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.md) | Bildeprogramloven | 2015-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.md) |
| [Lov om bibliotekvederlag](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) | Bibliotekvederlagsloven | 1987-05-29 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) |
| [Lov om dokumentasjon og arkiv (arkivlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-96.md) | Arkivlova | 2026-01-01, Kongen fastset | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-96.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i lov 4. desember 1992 nr. 127 om kringkasting](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) | Endringslov til kringkastingsloven | Kongen fastset, 2005-07-01, 2008-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i kringkastingsloven mv. (gjennomføring av endringsdirektiv til](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-02-28-2.md) | Endringslov til kringkastingsloven mv. | 2025-05-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-02-28-2.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i pengespill- og lotterilovgivningen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) | Endringslov til pengespill- og lotterilover | Kongen bestemmer, 2004-01-01, 2005-05-01, 2007-07-01, 2009-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) |
| [Lov om film og videogram](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) | Film- og videogramlova – filml | 1988-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) |
| [Lov om folkebibliotek (folkebibliotekloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) | Folkebibliotekloven | 1986-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) |
| [Lov om forbud mot prispåslag ved videresalg av billetter til kultur- og idrettsa](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) | Svartebørsloven | 2007-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) |
| [Lov om kollektiv forvaltning av opphavsrett mv.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-05-28-49.md) | Lov om kollektiv forvaltning av opphavsrett mv. | 2021-07-01, 2021-09-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-05-28-49.md) |
| [Lov om kringkasting og audiovisuelle bestillingstjenester mv. (kringkastingslove](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) | Kringkastingsloven – kringkl | 1994-01-01, 1993-11-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) |
| [Lov om likestilling og forbud mot diskriminering (likestillings- og diskrimineri](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.md) | Likestillings- og diskrimineringsloven – ldl | 2018-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.md) |
| [Lov om offentlege styresmakters ansvar for kulturverksemd (kulturlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) | Kulturlova | 2007-08-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) |
| [Lov om omsetning av bøker (bokloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-16-64.md) | Bokloven | 2024-01-01, 2025-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-16-64.md) |
| [Lov om opphavsrett til åndsverk mv. (åndsverkloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.md) | Åndsverkloven | 2018-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.md) |
| [Lov om organisert kampaktivitet som tillater knockout [knockoutloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) | Knockoutloven | 2002-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) |
| [Lov om pengespill (pengespilloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-03-18-12.md) | Pengespilloven | 2023-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-03-18-12.md) |
| [Lov om redaksjonell uavhengighet og ansvar i redaktørstyrte journalistiske medie](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-05-29-59.md) | Medieansvarsloven | 2020-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-05-29-59.md) |
| [Lov om register for frivillig virksomhet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) | Frivillighetsregisterloven | 2008-12-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) |
| [Lov om språk (språklova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2021-05-21-42.md) | Språklova | 2022-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-05-21-42.md) |
| [Lov om stadnamn (stadnamnlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) | Stadnamnlova – stadnl | 1991-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) |
| [Lov om vederlag for visning av billedkunst og kunsthåndverk m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) | Lov om vederlag for kunstvisning | 1993-05-28 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) |
| [Lov om åpenhet om eierskap i medier](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.md) | Lov om åpenhet om eierskap i medier | 2016-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.md) |
| [Lov om økonomisk støtte til mediene (mediestøtteloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-12-18-153.md) | Mediestøtteloven | 2021-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-12-18-153.md) |
